dimensions.name: Information Gathering
dimensions.description: Completeness and relevance of history taking across all dimensions (HPC, PMH, DH, FH, SH, ROS, ICE)

dimensions.name: Clinical Reasoning
dimensions.description: Logical progression, hypothesis-driven questioning, differential diagnosis consideration

dimensions.name: Diagnostic Accuracy
dimensions.description: Accuracy of final diagnosis and understanding of the clinical picture

dimensions.name: Communication
dimensions.description: Empathy, rapport building, use of open questions, avoidance of jargon, ICE exploration

dimensions.name: Efficiency
dimensions.description: Ratio of information gathered to number of turns; avoidance of redundant questions

dimensions.name: Safety
dimensions.description: Recognition of red flags, appropriate urgency, no dangerous omissions
